_comment: Cronicle event template for session-channel supervisor. Import via Cronicle's API or seed_jobs.py. Adjust paths to your install location.
title: session-channel supervisor
notes: Respawns crashed relay-pool worker panes. Each tick scans config.yaml relay_pool.workers and re-launches the wrapper command if a pane has returned to its shell prompt for longer than grace_seconds. Set enabled=true after configuring relay_pool.workers in config.yaml.
